sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f applied per-system, scaled by initial margin requirements. Portfolio constraint: if aggregate utilization U > 1.0, scale all positions down proportionally. Formula: f$i = (optimal_f × largest_loss) / margin$i. Ensures no margin calls across N simultaneous systems.

source_rule_text: Size positions using optimal f in dollars for each market system, constrained by initial margin requirements across a portfolio of multiple systems without incurring margin calls.
